pages.raw_text:
Hop picking will begin in the
Yakima and other Washington
yards in about a week and for the
following six weeks the fields will
be the scene of active operations.
Fully 1000 people, whites and In
dams are expected in Yakima. This
Is the one season Of the year when
Lo and his family are active and
mildly Industrious. The Indians
come from the Yakima. Nez Perez,
Occur d'Alene and Colville reserva-
tons east Of the Cascades, and
large delegations come from west
of the mountains.


White people with their families
make the season one of camping
out and working at the same time,
and they come from long distances.
The price paid for picking hops is
81 box, containing 16 bushels.
The Indians and professional white
